title: Find My Device - Device list with more then 4 devices
scenario: Verify that the device list expands and becomes scrollable with a bottom fade indicator when more than 4 headsets are present
steps: Ensure more than 4 headsets are present on the device list (connected or disconnected).
Check if the list can be expanded.
Check if the list is scrollable.
Look for a slight fade at the bottom of the list indicating scrolling ability.
expected: When more than 4 headsets are present, the device list is expandable and scrollable, with a slight fade at the bottom indicating scrolling ability.
